name: LEAPO FAITH
short_description: Play as LEAPO FAITH, and climb the tower by running, jumping, sliding, and swinging to find out what lies above.
detailed_description:
Challenge yourself in the adventure that follows LEAPO FAITH

You begin your adventure at the base of this epic tower and climb to the top. Simple enough, yet each jump, swing, and slide requires immense precision and talent to complete. Will you be able to conquer this tower?

Features:

  • No checkpoints. It is always possible to fall back to the very bottom if you're not careful
  • Stylized retro graphics
  • Ability to grapple and swing around on light colored obstacles
  • Skill-based gameplay
  • Whatever lies atop the tower...

LEAPO FAITH is inspired by the many foddian type of games that came prior. Specifically "Getting Over It", "Jump King", "Only Up!", and "A Difficult Game About Climbing". I also wanted to combine elements from other games I love playing, such as "Peeb Adventures", and make one game that I not only enjoyed, but loved speedrunning too.
